title: Canadian Dollar Money Orders
body_text:
Canadian Dollar Money Orders
1	Introduction to Canadian Dollar Money Orders
1.1	Overview of Canadian Dollar Money Orders
Canadian dollar Money Orders are drawn directly on the credit union. The credit union is debited for the value of the Money Order when it is presented for payment or cashed and settled through the Clearing.
Credit unions are responsible for ordering stock, controlling inventory, reconciling issued Money Orders to cleared Money Orders, and complying with legislative and regulatory measures.
BC credit unions order Canadian dollar Money Orders from Westkey Graphics. Ontario credit unions order Canadian dollar Money Orders from D+H (formerly Davis and Henderson).
